# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

// File: app/Services/TwilioService.php

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Config;
use Twilio\Rest\Client as TwilioClient;

class TwilioService
{
    private $accountSid;
    private $authToken;
    private $fromNumber;
    private $client;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->accountSid = Config::get('services.twilio.account_sid');
        $this->authToken = Config::get('services.twilio.auth_token');
        $this->fromNumber = Config::get('services.twilio.from_number');

        $this->client = new TwilioClient($this->accountSid, $this->authToken);
    }

    public function sendSms(string $to, string $message)
    {
        try {
            $smsResult = $this->client
                ->messages
                ->create($to, [
                    'from' => $this->fromNumber,
                    'body' => $message,
                ]);

            return true;
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            echo "Error sending SMS: {$e->getMessage()}";
            return false;
        }
    }

    public function __destruct()
    {
        // Destroy client instance to free up resources
        unset($this->client);
    }
}
